/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/rdkafka_producer.dir/postgresql_replicator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdkafka_producer.dir/producer_librdkafka.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdkafka_producer.dir/pgoutput_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdkafka_producer.dir/replication_message.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdkafka_producer.dir/config_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdkafka_producer.dir/main.cpp.o -o rdkafka_producer  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/lib64/libpq.so /usr/lib64/libcurl.so /usr/local/lib/librdkafka++.so /usr/local/lib/librdkafka.so -ljsoncpp /usr/lib64/libjsoncpp.so.1.9.5
